title: inverted hearts
description: inverse hud of all player stats
body:
Replaces the texture of full hearts with empty ones, and empty ones with full ones. The same with hunger, armor, air and experience.
I did not find a similar resource pack for the new versions, so I made it myself, no thanks (the only thing I found was [this](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/inverted-hearts/) resource pack, but it did not work).

[Вдохновлено 2-х серийным летсплеем Лантриса](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=AIDFsvBMB8E&list=PL1o1r4tfX1c6JxgDdsMu9ZDYt1ZTIO5aR)
